issue.body:
Spec: docs/specs/2026-05-17-superpowers-gh-workflow-integration-design.md
Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-16-pd-ui-new-repo.md

Build shared React/TypeScript component library for pd-* SPAs.

nodes.body: Tracked in the pd-ui repo (#12 in ocr-container-meta) — not a pd-book-tools task.

nodes.description: Design issue with a spec doc
nodes.name: kind:spec

issue.title: Spec: New pd-ui repo — shared React component library
Copy tokens.css and primitives.css into pd-ui/theme/
Export theme CSS via package subpaths
Non-Radix primitives — Button, Input, Textarea, Badge, Chip, StatusPip, KeyCap, Card, Separator, Progress
Radix-layered primitives — Dialog, AlertDialog, Popover, Tooltip, DropdownMenu, Select, Tabs, ToggleGroup, Accordion
Stage shell + image layer + fixed layer order
Slot helpers — BBoxLayer, WordHitLayer, MarqueeSelectLayer, RotateTransformerLayer, EraseOverlayLayer, CharRangeLayer
Status row primitives — StatusPip, ConfidenceBar, MatchStatusChip
Breadcrumb, TopNav, Drawer, Rail, RightPanel sub-shells
createUIPrefsStore + UIPrefsProvider + useUIPrefs + useTheme + useDensity + useLayerColor + useStatusColor + useAccentColor
useCanvasCoords + useSelection + useViewport + useWorklist re-exports from `/canvas` and `/worklist`
Primitives stories (Button, Input, Chip, StatusPip, KeyCap, Card, Separator, Progress, Badge, Field)
Publish dry-run + smoke install in tmp consumer

timeline.body: Tracked in the pd-ui repo (#12 in ocr-container-meta) — not a pd-book-tools task.
